# MicYou

> MicYou 将 Android 设备转变为 PC 的高质量麦克风，支持 Wi-Fi、USB 多种连接模式，提供专业音频处理功能。

## What is MicYou?

MicYou 是一款跨平台音频传输应用，可以将 Android 手机变成电脑的高质量麦克风。

核心功能：
- 多种连接模式：Wi-Fi、USB (ADB/AOA)
- 专业音频处理：噪声抑制、自动增益控制 (AGC)、去混响
- 虚拟麦克风支持：配合 VB-Cable 作为系统麦克风输入
- 跨平台：支持 Windows、Linux、macOS

## Documentation

### 简体中文

- [更新日志 - MicYou 版本历史](https://micyou.top/changelog): MicYou 更新日志，查看所有版本的新功能、改进和修复内容。
- [faq](https://micyou.top/docs/faq)
- [plugin-api-reference](https://micyou.top/docs/plugin/plugin-api-reference)
- [MicYou 插件开发最佳实践](https://micyou.top/docs/plugin/plugin-best-practices): MicYou 插件开发最佳实践指南，包含项目结构、生命周期管理、音频效果开发和性能优化建议
- [MicYou 插件开发指南](https://micyou.top/docs/plugin/plugin-development-guide): MicYou 插件系统开发快速入门，学习如何创建自定义插件扩展应用功能
- [MicYou 插件包格式规范](https://micyou.top/docs/plugin/plugin-package-format): MicYou 插件包结构规范详解，包含 plugin.json 配置、JAR 文件要求和图标规范
- [quick-start](https://micyou.top/docs/quick-start)
- [download](https://micyou.top/download)
- [video](https://micyou.top/video)

### English

- [Changelog - MicYou Version History](https://micyou.top/en/changelog): MicYou changelog with all version updates, new features, improvements and bug fixes.
- [faq](https://micyou.top/en/docs/faq)
- [plugin-api-reference](https://micyou.top/en/docs/plugin/plugin-api-reference)
- [MicYou Plugin Development Best Practices](https://micyou.top/en/docs/plugin/plugin-best-practices): Best practices guide for MicYou plugin development including project structure, lifecycle management, audio effect development, and performance optimization
- [MicYou Plugin Development Guide](https://micyou.top/en/docs/plugin/plugin-development-guide): Quick start guide for MicYou plugin system development, learn how to create custom plugins to extend app functionality
- [MicYou Plugin Package Format Specification](https://micyou.top/en/docs/plugin/plugin-package-format): Detailed MicYou plugin package structure specification including plugin.json configuration, JAR file requirements, and icon specifications
- [quick-start](https://micyou.top/en/docs/quick-start)
- [Download MicYou - Windows, macOS, Linux, Android](https://micyou.top/en/download): Download MicYou client for Windows, macOS, Linux desktop and Android mobile to turn your phone into a PC microphone.
- [Video Tutorials - MicYou Guide](https://micyou.top/en/video): MicYou video tutorials including project introduction, whats new, and usage guides to help you get started turning your phone into a PC microphone.

- [plugin-api-reference](https://micyou.top/zh-TW/docs/plugin/plugin-api-reference)

- [影片教學 - MicYou 使用教學](https://micyou.top/zh-TW/video): MicYou 影片教學，包含專案簡介、更新介紹和使用教學，幫助您快速上手將手機變成電腦麥克風。

## Quick Start

1. 从 GitHub Releases 下载桌面端应用
2. 下载并安装 Android APK
3. 确保设备在同一网络（Wi-Fi 模式）或通过 USB 连接
4. 在两端选择相同的连接模式

## Downloads

- [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/LanRhyme/MicYou/releases)
